# Milestone Seeds

Suggested milestone progression:

| Milestone | Goal |
| --- | --- |
| `Foundation` | Repository bootstrap, docs, CI, package boundaries, initial schema |
| `V0 CLI Skeleton` | CLI coverage for core flows with fake providers |
| `V1 Usable CLI` | Stable local reading session and note workflow |
| `V2 Desktop Shell` | Thin desktop shell over the local core |
| `V3 Editor Integration Spike` | Validate editor adapters without contaminating the core |

Create them manually with `gh`, or run `.github/bootstrap-gh.sh`.
